PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Dec-18-2006 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Adriana Quintero appearing for petitioner Ginger Salceda. Paul Tour-Sarkissian and Omar Nakib appearing for pre-deceased wife's brothers and sisters. Steven Weinkauf appearing for Public Administrator as the Special Administrator. Oppositions to admit the Lost Will stated by Mr. Nakib. Ms. Quintero responded to the oppositions. Court is admitting the Lost Will dated June 11, 2001. Court is appointing the Public Administrator as Administrator with Will Annexed wigth full authority. N/B. Order signed. Mr. Tour-Sarkissian stated they will file a will contest. Judge Pro Tem: Stella Pantazis. Reporter: Leticia Perez, CSR#7782. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-27-2006 Continued To Dec-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED, APPOINTMENT UNDER IAEA
Off Calendar Nov-13-2006 Continued To Nov-27-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Oct-23-2006 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Sep-18-2006 Continued To Oct-23-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for petitioner. Paul Tour-Sarkission appearing for beneficiaries of the predeceased wife. Andriana Quintaro appearing for Ginger Salcedo. Mr. Weinkauf requested for continuance for 30 days to allow Ms. Quintaro to file a petition for probate of will. If her petition is on file by 10/23. The P.A.'s petition will go off calendar. Special Letters to remain in effect under further order of court. Mr. Weinkauf will prepare an order to extend the Special Letters. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Aug-07-2006 Continued To Sep-18-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: APPEARENCES BY JOHNATHAN FERDON, PUBLIC ADMIN.
COPY OF WILL FOUND. PUBLIC ADMIN. MAY AMEND PETITION TO REFLECT THE FINDING OF THE COPY OF WILL. SPECIAL LETTERS ISSUED UNTIL 9/18/06.
COMMISSINER: DOROTHY MCMATH; CLERK:LARRISA DITSIN; RPTR:CHRISTINA PAXTON

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jul-05-2006 Continued To Aug-07-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for Public Administrator. Counsel for the eight siblings of the predeceased spouse is in court. Dave Wasserman appearing for creditor/landlord. Mr. Weinkauf informs that court that he has been exchanging emails with Ginger Salceda. She has asked him about the process of getting an attoney here. Lost will issued addressed. Court wants Mr. Weinkauf to write a letter to Ginger Salceda to tell her to retain counsel if she wants to pursue her rights and to enclose a SF State Bar pamphlet. Matter is continued to 8/7. The Public Administrator to continue as the special administrator with general powers. Mr. Wasserman wants possession of the apartment and Mr. Weinkauf will have his office release the apartment. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Teena Paxton CSR#1558. Clerk: Ella Yip.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar Jun-14-2006 Continued To Jul-05-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-31-2006 Continued To Jun-14-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Steven Weinkauf appearing for Public Administrator. Issues addressed. Court wants more support on why the copy should not be admitted as a lost will. Matter is continued to 6/14. Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR 11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION
Off Calendar May-30-2006 Continued To May-31-06 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
